Your Capital. Evolving.

AI strategies compete. The engine mutates the winners. Natural selection picks your yield.

ERC-4626 Vault · Lit Protocol Integration (Chipotle v3 Ready) · Multi-AI Consensus · Base Mainnet

Build Story
Vault:0x4a55DEEC24C6b5c1aa6301b43b4D9680c10491d7
System Architecture

A Living Financial Organism

DarwinFi is not a static vault. It is a living system with organs that sense, adapt, defend, and evolve.

Hover or tap an organ to explore the anatomy

Core Capabilities

Self-Evolving

Every 4 hours, AI evaluates all strategies, mutates parameters, and promotes winners. No manual rebalancing ever.

Cryptographically Safe

Lit Protocol integration built for Chipotle v3 mainnet. PKP key management, spending limits, position sizes, and circuit breakers ready for on-chain enforcement.

Multi-AI Architecture

Three AI models vote on market direction independently. Consensus drives action. No single point of failure.

Standard ERC-4626

Fully composable tokenized vault. Deposit USDC, receive shares. Withdraw anytime. Integrates with any DeFi protocol.

Live Vault Telemetry

Polling every 8 seconds from /api/state

Total Trades
Active Strategies
Evolution Cycles
Total PnL
The Process

How It Works

Three steps from deposit to evolved returns.

Step 01

Deposit

Connect your wallet, deposit USDC into the ERC-4626 vault. You receive shares representing your stake in the evolving ecosystem.

Step 02

Compete & Evolve

Trading strategies compete simultaneously. Each is scored on PnL, Sharpe ratio, drawdown, and consistency. Every 4 hours, AI mutates winners and eliminates the weak.

Step 03

Champion Trades Live

The fittest strategy earns champion status and executes real trades with vault capital. Your capital adapts to markets autonomously.
